name: Starlink Group 10-41
description: A batch of 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
program_description: Starlink is a satellite internet constellation operated by American aerospace company SpaceX
footer_right: SUCCESS: Landed at Just Read the Instructions.
rocket_fact: The Falcon 9 is transported horizontally on the road, pressurized with nitrogen to keep the thin tanks rigid.
